---
title: "Module 0: Setup and Environment Check"
author: "NCME 2026 PGDCM Workshop"
output: html_document
---

# Setup and Environment Check

Run this script to ensure your R environment is correctly configured prior to the workshop modules.

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# 1. Load the core statistical and psychometric libraries
library(nimble)
library(pgdcm)

# 2. Load the sample data library
# If you don't have dcmdata installed, uncomment the line below:
# install.packages("dcmdata", repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
library(dcmdata)

# 3. Load the graphical visualization libraries
library(igraph)

# Note: You must have the Cytoscape application OPEN on your computer
# before running the next lines.
library(RCy3) 
cytoscapePing() # This should return "You are connected to Cytoscape!"

cat("🚀 All libraries loaded successfully! You are ready for the workshop.\n")
```
